whats_working: Codebase Onboarding Docs pack has 17 all-time sales at $5, the only product with any paid traction.
The r/ClaudeAI post on onboarding skills got 6 comments, the highest engagement of any post.
Reddit activity is sparse (all posts scored 0-1), so no further patterns can be confirmed from current data.
Free Claude Code skills exist as a discovery funnel, but conversion to paid has stalled in the last 30 days.
what_to_fix: Zero sales in 30 days across all products. Posting cadence and subreddit targeting need an immediate reset.
Most posts scored 0-1 with no comments. Titles like 'I automated my team's weekly reports' bury the problem. Lead with pain.
35+ free products have zero downloads. Free alone does not drive traffic. Each needs at least one Reddit post.
All posts go to r/ClaudeAI or low-traffic subreddits. High-volume subs like r/SideProject and r/ChatGPTCoding are underused.

pricing_suggestions.reason: Prompt packs for specific pain points (error handling) have clear ROI for builders. Zero downloads now, so test paid with a Reddit push.
Agency launch content commands higher perceived value. $9 filters serious buyers and increases average order value.
